org.springframework.data.relational.repository.query.RelationalEntityMetadata

Packages that use RelationalEntityMetadata
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.jdbc.repository.query
Query derivation mechanism for JDBC specific repositories.
org.springframework.data.r2dbc.repository.query
Query support for R2DBC repositories.
org.springframework.data.relational.repository.query
Query support for relational database repositories.

    JdbcQueryCreator(RelationalMappingContext context, PartTree tree, JdbcConverter converter, Dialect dialect, RelationalEntityMetadata<?> entityMetadata, RelationalParameterAccessor accessor, boolean isSliceQuery, ReturnedType returnedType, Optional<Lock> lockMode, SqlGeneratorSource sqlGeneratorSource)
